zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Fulk FitzWarin於大約1310年出生時，他的父親Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarin31歲，母親Eleanor de Beauchamp34歲。他於大約1335年與Margaret de Beamont結婚。他去世於1349年7月25日享年40歲。

nameMeanings.name: Fulk
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

variants.name: Fulke
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Fulk FitzWarin was born about 1310, his father, Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarin, was 31 and his mother, Eleanor de Beauchamp, was 34. He married Margaret de Beamont about 1335. He died on 25 July 1349, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Fulk FitzWarin est né environ 1310, son père, Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarin, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Beauchamp, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Beamont environ 1335. Il est décédé le 25 juillet 1349, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Fulk FitzWarin um 1310 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarin 31 und seine Mutter Eleanor de Beauchamp 34. Er hat um 1335 Margaret de Beamont geheiratet. Er starb am 25. Juli 1349 im Alter von 40 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Fulk FitzWarin è nato il circa 1310, il suo padre, Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarin, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor de Beauchamp, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Beamont circa 1335. Morì il 25 luglio 1349, all'età di 40 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Fulk FitzWarin(이)가 대략 1310년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarin(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor de Beauchamp(은)는 34세였다. 그는 대략 1335년 Margaret de Beamont(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1349년 7월 25일 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Fulk FitzWarin nasceu aproximadamente 1310, seu pai, Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarin, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de Beauchamp, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Beamont aproximadamente 1335. Ele faleceu em 25 de julho de 1349, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Fulk FitzWarin родился около 1310 г., его отцу по имени Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarin было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Beauchamp, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Beamont около 1335 г. Он умер 25 июля 1349 г. в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Fulk FitzWarin nació aproximadamente 1310, su papá, Fulk FitzWarin 2nd Baron FitzWarin, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Eleanor de Beauchamp, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Margaret de Beamont aproximadamente 1335. Murió el 25 de julio de 1349, a la edad de 40 años.
